title: Rail charge
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Rail charges''' were small explosives used as ammunition in [[Rail detonator|Rail Detonators]]. In addition to being powerful explosives, they stuck onto the point of impact for a few seconds before exploding, thus possibly taking out more targets than originally intended.

In terms of explosive force, this weapon was very powerful, with seven or eight rounds being able to destroy an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]]. One shot would take down a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] in full combat armor. It was also one of the few weapons, including the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], able to kill a full size [[Kell dragon/Legends|Kell dragon]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2014-10-14 -->''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]''
